name: tuxie-vibe
description: Hand-authored agent skills, usable in Claude Code (via this marketplace), Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and OpenCode (via .agents/skills/).

plugins.name: codebase-deep-analysis
plugins.description: Exhaustive parallel-analyst deep analysis of an entire codebase. Writes a right-sized, tier-aware report directory under docs/code-analysis/{date}/ — indexed README, per-cluster fix plans, by-analyst dumps, checklist, META rules — so a T1 hobby tool doesn't get T3 enterprise advice. Includes a gated Step 3.5 coverage/profiling pass and a Step 6 self-evolution retrospective.
